name: agent
tagline: Chat with your Claude Code sessions — a channel per session.

events.title: A message arrived on a channel
A session replied on a channel

actions.title: Deliver an inbound message (wakes the session)

provision.note: hub registers a vault runtime trigger that webhooks the agent inbound endpoint with an agent:send bearer

connectionTemplates.title: Link a channel to a vault
connectionTemplates.description: Back a channel with a Parachute vault: inbound notes wake the session, replies are written back as notes. The operator picks WHICH vault (the parameter) and names the channel; the channel's config UI creates the connection with the operator's approval (the click is the approval).

parameters.title: Vault
parameters.description: Which vault stores this channel's messages — the operator chooses from the hub's installed vaults.

parameters.title: Channel name
parameters.description: A unique slug naming the channel the session connects to.
